name: @pi-gui/oh-my-pi-acp-client
description: ACP (Agent Client Protocol) wrapper for the oh-my-pi coding agent. Spawns the compiled omp binary in --mode acp and adapts the event stream to a SessionDriver-shaped API so the existing React renderer can port surgically. Intended as a checkpoint, not long-term architecture — see the plan's 'Future migration note' for the direct-ACP-in-renderer follow-up.
